page_metadata.biotools__summary: 3d-SPADE is a method to find reoccurring spike patterns in parallel spike train data, and to determine their statistical significance. It is a part of Elephant.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: 3d-SPADE is a method to find reoccurring spike patterns in parallel spike train data, and to determine their statistical significance. It is a part of Elephant.
